resources.string:
Welcome %s to NoExcuse 💪

We are delighted to welcome you.
Choosing this app is a strong step—it shows that you care about your time, your goals, and the person you want to become.
This space is yours.

A place to progress, stay consistent, and exceed your limits.
No pressure, no excuses—just progress, one step at a time.
Thank you for trusting us on this journey.

Let's start
